---
title: YAML Parameter Test
format: html
toastui:
  # ── Extension Options ───────────────────────────────────────────
  # height
  test-height:
    height: 400px
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Height test"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  test-height-numeric:
    height: 500
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Height numeric"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # timegridHeight
  test-timegrid-height:
    timegridHeight: "300%"
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Timegrid height test"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # navigation true
  test-nav-true:
    navigation: true
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Nav on"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # navigation false
  test-nav-false:
    navigation: false
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Nav off"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # file (TSV)
  test-file-tsv:
    file: "data/events.tsv"
    file-sep: "\t"
    date: "2026-04-14"

  # file (CSV)
  test-file-csv:
    file: "data/events.csv"
    file-sep: ","
    date: "2026-04-17"

  # date
  test-date:
    date: "2026-04-16"
    events:
      - title: "Date test"
        start: "2026-04-16T10:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-16T11:00:00"

  # events (inline YAML)
  test-events-inline:
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - id: "e1"
        calendarId: "cal1"
        title: "Inline event A"
        category: "time"
        start: "2026-04-14T08:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        location: "Room A"
      - id: "e2"
        calendarId: "cal1"
        title: "Inline event B"
        category: "allday"
        start: "2026-04-15"
        end: "2026-04-15"
        isAllday: true

  # calendars
  test-calendars:
    date: "2026-04-14"
    calendars:
      - id: "cal1"
        name: "Work"
        color: "#ffffff"
        backgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
        borderColor: "#02836e"
      - id: "cal2"
        name: "Personal"
        color: "#ffffff"
        backgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
        borderColor: "#0080cc"
    events:
      - calendarId: "cal1"
        title: "Work event"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"
      - calendarId: "cal2"
        title: "Personal event"
        start: "2026-04-14T14:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T15:00:00"

  # ── Pass-through TOAST UI Options ──────────────────────────────
  # defaultView: week
  test-view-week:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Week view"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # defaultView: month
  test-view-month:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Month view"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # defaultView: day
  test-view-day:
    defaultView: day
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Day view"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # useFormPopup
  test-useformpopup:
    useFormPopup: true
    isReadOnly: false
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Form popup test"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # useDetailPopup
  test-usedetailpopup:
    useDetailPopup: true
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Detail popup test"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"
        location: "Room X"

  # isReadOnly: true
  test-readonly-true:
    isReadOnly: true
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Read only"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # isReadOnly: false
  test-readonly-false:
    isReadOnly: false
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Editable"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # usageStatistics
  test-usagestats:
    usageStatistics: true
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Stats on"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # gridSelection: boolean
  test-gridselection-bool:
    gridSelection: false
    isReadOnly: false
    date: "2026-04-14"
    events:
      - title: "Grid selection off"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # gridSelection: object
  test-gridselection-obj:
    isReadOnly: false
    date: "2026-04-14"
    gridSelection:
      enableClick: true
      enableDblClick: false
    events:
      - title: "Grid selection obj"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # timezone
  test-timezone:
    date: "2026-04-14"
    timezone:
      zones:
        - timezoneName: "America/New_York"
          displayLabel: "New York"
          timezoneOffset: -5
    events:
      - title: "Timezone test"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # theme
  test-theme:
    date: "2026-04-14"
    theme:
      common:
        backgroundColor: "#f0f0f0"
        saturday:
          color: "#3162ea"
        sunday:
          color: "#e03131"
    events:
      - title: "Theme test"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # template (milestone template)
  test-template:
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      taskView:
        - milestone
        - task
    events:
      - title: "Template test"
        category: "milestone"
        start: "2026-04-14"
        end: "2026-04-14"

  # ── WeekOptions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # week.startDayOfWeek
  test-week-startday:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      startDayOfWeek: 1
    events:
      - title: "Week startDay"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.dayNames
  test-week-daynames:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      dayNames:
        - Sun
        - Mon
        - Tue
        - Wed
        - Thu
        - Fri
        - Sat
    events:
      - title: "Week dayNames"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.narrowWeekend
  test-week-narrowweekend:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      narrowWeekend: true
    events:
      - title: "Narrow weekend"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.workweek
  test-week-workweek:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      workweek: true
    events:
      - title: "Workweek"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.showNowIndicator
  test-week-nowindicator:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      showNowIndicator: false
    events:
      - title: "No now indicator"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.showTimezoneCollapseButton
  test-week-tz-collapse-btn:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    timezone:
      zones:
        - timezoneName: "Europe/Stockholm"
          displayLabel: "Stockholm"
        - timezoneName: "America/New_York"
          displayLabel: "New York"
    week:
      showTimezoneCollapseButton: true
    events:
      - title: "TZ collapse btn"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.timezonesCollapsed
  test-week-tz-collapsed:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    timezone:
      zones:
        - timezoneName: "Europe/Stockholm"
          displayLabel: "Stockholm"
        - timezoneName: "America/New_York"
          displayLabel: "New York"
    week:
      showTimezoneCollapseButton: true
      timezonesCollapsed: true
    events:
      - title: "TZ collapsed"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.hourStart
  test-week-hourstart:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      hourStart: 8
    events:
      - title: "Hour start 8"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.hourEnd
  test-week-hourend:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      hourEnd: 18
    events:
      - title: "Hour end 18"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.eventView: boolean false
  test-week-eventview-false:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      eventView: false
    events:
      - title: "eventView false"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.eventView: array
  test-week-eventview-array:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      eventView:
        - time
    events:
      - title: "eventView time only"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.taskView: boolean false
  test-week-taskview-false:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      taskView: false
    events:
      - title: "taskView false"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # week.taskView: array
  test-week-taskview-array:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      taskView:
        - milestone
    events:
      - title: "taskView milestone only"
        category: "milestone"
        start: "2026-04-14"
        end: "2026-04-14"

  # week.collapseDuplicateEvents
  test-week-collapse-dupes:
    defaultView: week
    date: "2026-04-14"
    week:
      collapseDuplicateEvents: true
    events:
      - title: "Duplicate"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"
      - title: "Duplicate"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # ── MonthOptions ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # month.dayNames
  test-month-daynames:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-14"
    month:
      dayNames:
        - SUN
        - MON
        - TUE
        - WED
        - THU
        - FRI
        - SAT
    events:
      - title: "Month dayNames"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # month.startDayOfWeek
  test-month-startday:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-14"
    month:
      startDayOfWeek: 1
    events:
      - title: "Month startDay"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # month.narrowWeekend
  test-month-narrowweekend:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-14"
    month:
      narrowWeekend: true
    events:
      - title: "Month narrow"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # month.visibleWeeksCount
  test-month-visibleweeks:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-14"
    month:
      visibleWeeksCount: 2
    events:
      - title: "Visible weeks 2"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # month.isAlways6Weeks
  test-month-always6weeks:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-14"
    month:
      isAlways6Weeks: false
    events:
      - title: "Not always 6 weeks"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # month.workweek
  test-month-workweek:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-14"
    month:
      workweek: true
    events:
      - title: "Month workweek"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"

  # month.visibleEventCount
  test-month-eventcount:
    defaultView: month
    date: "2026-04-14"
    month:
      visibleEventCount: 2
    events:
      - title: "Event 1"
        start: "2026-04-14T09:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T10:00:00"
      - title: "Event 2"
        start: "2026-04-14T11:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T12:00:00"
      - title: "Event 3"
        start: "2026-04-14T13:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T14:00:00"
      - title: "Event 4"
        start: "2026-04-14T15:00:00"
        end: "2026-04-14T16:00:00"
---

Each section below tests one parameter in isolation.

## Extension Options

### height (string)

Height set to `400px`.

{{< toastui test-height >}}

### height (numeric)

Height set to `500` (coerced to `500px`).

{{< toastui test-height-numeric >}}

### timegridHeight

Timegrid height set to `300%`.

{{< toastui test-timegrid-height >}}

### navigation: true

Navigation bar visible.

{{< toastui test-nav-true >}}

### navigation: false

Navigation bar hidden.

{{< toastui test-nav-false >}}

### file (TSV)

Events loaded from `data/events.tsv` with tab separator.

{{< toastui test-file-tsv >}}

### file (CSV)

Events loaded from `data/events.csv` with comma separator.

{{< toastui test-file-csv >}}

### date

Initial date set to `2026-04-16`.

{{< toastui test-date >}}

### events (inline YAML)

Two inline events: one timed, one allday.

{{< toastui test-events-inline >}}

### calendars

Two calendar definitions with distinct colors.

{{< toastui test-calendars >}}

## Pass-through TOAST UI Options

### defaultView: week

{{< toastui test-view-week >}}

### defaultView: month

{{< toastui test-view-month >}}

### defaultView: day

{{< toastui test-view-day >}}

### useFormPopup: true

Click an empty time slot to see the create form popup (isReadOnly is false).

{{< toastui test-useformpopup >}}

### useDetailPopup: true

Click an event to see the detail popup.

{{< toastui test-usedetailpopup >}}

### isReadOnly: true

Events cannot be dragged or edited.

{{< toastui test-readonly-true >}}

### isReadOnly: false

Events can be dragged and edited.

{{< toastui test-readonly-false >}}

### usageStatistics: true

Usage statistics enabled (network request to NHN).

{{< toastui test-usagestats >}}

### gridSelection: false

Date grid click selection disabled.

{{< toastui test-gridselection-bool >}}

### gridSelection: object

Click enabled, double-click disabled.

{{< toastui test-gridselection-obj >}}

### timezone

Timezone set to America/New_York.

{{< toastui test-timezone >}}

### theme

Custom background color applied via theme.

{{< toastui test-theme >}}

### template

Milestone task view with template test.

{{< toastui test-template >}}

## WeekOptions

### week.startDayOfWeek

Start day set to Monday (1).

{{< toastui test-week-startday >}}

### week.dayNames

Custom day name labels.

{{< toastui test-week-daynames >}}

### week.narrowWeekend

Weekend columns narrowed.

{{< toastui test-week-narrowweekend >}}

### week.workweek

Weekends excluded.

{{< toastui test-week-workweek >}}

### week.showNowIndicator: false

Current time indicator hidden.

{{< toastui test-week-nowindicator >}}

### week.showTimezoneCollapseButton

Collapse button shown with two timezone zones.

{{< toastui test-week-tz-collapse-btn >}}

### week.timezonesCollapsed

Sub-timezones start collapsed.

{{< toastui test-week-tz-collapsed >}}

### week.hourStart

Time grid starts at hour 8.

{{< toastui test-week-hourstart >}}

### week.hourEnd

Time grid ends at hour 18.

{{< toastui test-week-hourend >}}

### week.eventView: false

All event panels hidden.

{{< toastui test-week-eventview-false >}}

### week.eventView: [time]

Only time panel shown (allday hidden).

{{< toastui test-week-eventview-array >}}

### week.taskView: false

Task/milestone panels hidden.

{{< toastui test-week-taskview-false >}}

### week.taskView: [milestone]

Only milestone panel shown.

{{< toastui test-week-taskview-array >}}

### week.collapseDuplicateEvents

Two identical events collapsed.

{{< toastui test-week-collapse-dupes >}}

## MonthOptions

### month.dayNames

Custom uppercase day labels.

{{< toastui test-month-daynames >}}

### month.startDayOfWeek

Start day set to Monday (1).

{{< toastui test-month-startday >}}

### month.narrowWeekend

Weekend columns narrowed in month view.

{{< toastui test-month-narrowweekend >}}

### month.visibleWeeksCount

Only 2 weeks visible.

{{< toastui test-month-visibleweeks >}}

### month.isAlways6Weeks: false

Not forced to 6 rows.

{{< toastui test-month-always6weeks >}}

### month.workweek

Weekends excluded in month view.

{{< toastui test-month-workweek >}}

### month.visibleEventCount

Max 2 visible events per day (4 events on same day).

{{< toastui test-month-eventcount >}}
